title: [Shogi] Is 3-Minute Blitz the Cause of Your Plateau? 4 Disadvantages of Short-Time Games for Improvemen
titleHtml:
[Shogi] Is 3-Minute Blitz the Cause of Your Plateau?
4 Disadvantages of Short-Time Games for Improvemen
lead: If you want to improve at Shogi, ultra-fast games can work against you. This post explains four practical drawbacks of short-time formats and why 10-minute games plus post-game analysis are more effective.

title: Why I Wrote a Shogi (Japanese Chess) Guide for Global Beginners
titleHtml:
Why I Wrote a Shogi (Japanese Chess) Guide
for Global Beginners
lead: I share why I wrote beginner-focused English Shogi books, what gap I saw after "learning the rules," and how practical thinking can help players start winning and enjoying real games.
